prompts.proposer:
Call proposer_brief() FIRST. The tool output includes pattern_analyst_insights — use trend_champion, seasonality_champion, and insights.recommended_method_hint to bias your candidate selection toward non-mean methods. MUST propose at least 3 candidates including at least 1 non-baseline type. Return ONLY JSON per instructions. IMPORTANT: you MUST ONLY reference candidate names that appear in the tool output candidate_library; unknown names will hard-stop.
PATTERN ANALYST INSIGHTS: trend_champion='ONLY_FT_svr', seasonality_champion='CWT_rf', recommended_method='dba_combination'. Narrative: The validation folds show mixed trend directions (one down, two up) with significant seasonality amplitude. Models disagree substantially on both trend tracking (ONLY_FT_svr leads) and seasonal capture (CWT_rf leads), creating high model disagreement and seasonality variance. This pattern strongly supports DBA combination to leverage complementary strengths across horizons while mitigating individual model weaknesses.

raw.pattern_analyst:
{
  "trend_champion": "ONLY_FT_svr",
  "seasonality_champion": "CWT_rf",
  "overall_champion": "ARIMA",
  "horizon_specialists": {"early": "CWT_rf", "late": "FT_svr"},
  "tier1_models": ["ARIMA", "ETS", "THETA", "ONLY_CWT_catboost", "CWT_rf", "ONLY_CWT_rf", "DWT_catboost", "svr"],
  "tier2_models": ["catboost", "FT_rf", "ONLY_DWT_rf", "NaiveSeasonal", "CWT_catboost", "rf", "DWT_rf", "FT_catboost"],
  "recommended_method_hint": "dba_combination",
  "recommended_weighting_basis": "mixed",
  "key_insights": {
    "rmse_spread_ratio": 0.7919,
    "high_disagreement": true,
    "high_seasonality_variance": true,
    "ytrue_trend_directions": ["down", "up", "up"]
  },
  "cot_narrative": "The validation folds show mixed trend directions (one down, two up) with significant seasonality amplitude. Models disagree substantially on both trend tracking (ONLY_FT_svr leads) and seasonal capture (CWT_rf leads), creating high model disagreement and seasonality variance. This pattern strongly supports DBA combination to leverage complementary strengths across horizons while mitigating individual model weaknesses."
}

pattern_analyst.cot_narrative: The validation folds show mixed trend directions (one down, two up) with significant seasonality amplitude. Models disagree substantially on both trend tracking (ONLY_FT_svr leads) and seasonal capture (CWT_rf leads), creating high model disagreement and seasonality variance. This pattern strongly supports DBA combination to leverage complementary strengths across horizons while mitigating individual model weaknesses.
